disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Deep crushing, burning pain felt all over the body at once rather than in one spot, with muscles clamped tight
trigger_question_examples: Can you describe the pain — what does it feel like and where exactly is it?
Is the pain in one place or all over?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a deep crushing, burning pain everywhere at once — my back, arms, legs, all of it — and my muscles feel clamped up so tight I can't bend.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Even light touch to the skin and sudden sounds are experienced as agonising (allodynia and hypersensitivity to light/noise)
trigger_question_examples: What happens if something lightly touches your skin?
Are you sensitive to light or noise right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Even the lightest touch on my skin is agony, and a sudden noise makes me jump and hurts — I've had to shut the blinds because the light and sound are too much.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Full daily allowance of over-the-counter anti-inflammatory painkillers already taken within a few hours with no effect; living alone and tempted to take more out of desperation
trigger_question_examples: What have you taken for the pain, and how much?
Have the painkillers helped at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've already taken the full day's amount of my anti-inflammatory painkillers in the last few hours and it's done nothing — I'm so desperate I could just take more.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Bladder and bowel control are normal, there is no numbness around the groin/saddle area, and the legs still take weight
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any loss of control of your bladder or bowels?
Any numbness around your groin, buttocks or inner thighs — the area you'd sit on a saddle?
Are your legs still taking your weight, or any new weakness there?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my waterworks and bowels are normal, I don't have any numbness down below, and my legs still hold me up — I just can't move for the pain and stiffness.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't know, I can't think about anything except how much everything hurts.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Urine is a normal colour and amount — not dark, tea- or cola-coloured — and there was no crush injury, just light activity
trigger_question_examples: What colour is your urine — any chance it looks dark, like tea or cola?
Are you passing water as much as normal?
Did anything heavy crush or trap your muscles, or was it just light activity?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My urine looks normal, not dark or cola-coloured, and I'm going as usual. Nothing crushed me — it just came on after a little bit of light activity.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I haven't really looked, I've just been stuck in bed.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feeling panicky and hypervigilant, jumping at every sound, and unable to cope with the pain while alone at home
trigger_question_examples: How are you coping with all this right now?
Are you feeling panicky or on edge?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm panicking and completely on edge — I jump at every little sound and I just can't cope with this on my own tonight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: This is a flare of long-standing widespread body pain that began after a car accident two years ago; it flares from time to time and previous checks found nothing serious
trigger_question_examples: Have you had this kind of widespread pain before?
When did this body pain first start?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had widespread pain all over ever since a car crash two years ago, and it flares up like this now and then. I've been checked before and they never found anything serious.
